ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position_id" INTEGER /* ID of the position the player plays */,
  "multiplier" INTEGER /* Multiplier for the player's position */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player is currently associated with */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the player (e.g., active, injured, suspended) */,
  "value" INTEGER /* Monetary value of the player */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the player's image */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_position_id FOREIGN KEY ("position_id") REFERENCES positions ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "position_name" TEXT /* Name of the position (e.g., Forward, Midfielder, Defender) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the position */,
  "max_players" INTEGER /* Maximum number of players allowed in this position in a team */,
  "min_players" INTEGER /* Minimum number of players required in this position in a team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the league */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the league */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the league */,
  "max_teams" INTEGER /* Maximum number of teams allowed in the league */,
  "entry_fee" INTEGER /* Entry fee for joining the league */,
  "prize_pool" INTEGER /* Total prize pool for the league */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the team */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league the team belongs to */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "total_points" INTEGER /* Total points scored by the team */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Current rank of the team in the league */,
  "budget" INTEGER /* Budget available for team management */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the team was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_players" (
  "team_player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team-player combination */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "is_captain" INTEGER /* Whether the player is the team captain */,
  "is_vice_captain" INTEGER /* Whether the player is the team vice-captain */,
  "transfer_cost" INTEGER /* Cost of transferring the player to the team */,
  "transfer_date" TEXT /* Date when the player was transferred to the team */,
  "is_substitute" INTEGER /* Whether the player is a substitute */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_players_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., user, administrator, league official) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "points_scored" INTEGER /* Points scored by the player in the match */,
  "goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists made by the player */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Number of minutes the player played in the match */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards received by the player */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards received by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_performance_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_performance_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "match_name" TEXT /* Name of the match */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league the match belongs to */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date of the match */,
  "home_team" TEXT /* Name of the home team */,
  "away_team" TEXT /* Name of the away team */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "league_officials" (
  "official_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each official */,
  "official_name" TEXT /* Full name of the official */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league the official manages */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the official (e.g., commissioner, administrator) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the official account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the official's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("official_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_league_officials_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "official_id" INTEGER /* ID of the official sending the notification */,
  "notification_text" TEXT /* Text of the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Whether the notification has been read */,
  "is_important" INTEGER /* Whether the notification is important */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_official_id FOREIGN KEY ("official_id") REFERENCES league_officials ("official_id")
)
